data.title: Binance Alpha Airdrop Opens at 17:00 UTC+8 With 233-Point Claim Threshold
data.description: Binance announced that its Binance Alpha airdrop event will open at 17:00 (UTC+8) today, allowing eligible users to claim token rewards through the Alpha program.According to the announcement, users holding at least 233 Binance Alpha points will be eligible to participate. The airdrop will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis and will remain available until the reward pool is fully depleted or the event officially concludes.

data.title: Bitcoin (BTC) Drops Below 88,000 USDT with 0.21% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin (BTC) dropped below 88,000 USDT and is now trading at 87,999.070313 USDT, with 0.21% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Binance to Adjust Portfolio Margin Collateral Ratios and USD-M Futures Leverage on Jan. 30
data.description: Binance announced updates to Portfolio Margin (PM), PM Pro collateral ratios, and USDⓈ-M perpetual contract leverage and margin tiers, effective January 30, 2026, as part of its ongoing risk management adjustments.Portfolio Margin collateral ratio updateBinance will update the collateral ratios and tiered collateral ratios for selected assets under Portfolio Margin and PM Pro at 06:00 UTC, with the process expected to take approximately 30 minutes.Key changes include:DASH, ICP: collateral ratio raised from 25% to 30%USDP: reduced from 99.9% to 90%RAY: reduced from 50% to 40%Multiple altcoins (including LUNA, SKL, SAGA, ENJ, IMX, PIXEL, RONIN, BLUR, ALT, HFT): adjusted from 35% to 30%ONE: reduced sharply from 25% to 10%COTI: reduced from 15% to 10%These changes will directly impact margin efficiency and liquidation thresholds for Portfolio Margin users.PM Pro tier adjustmentsFor SAGA, PIXEL, and ALT, Binance will revise PM Pro tier structures, lowering cap thresholds and adjusting collateral scaling across position sizes. Large-position tiers will see reduced effective collateral ratios, increasing margin sensitivity for high-notional traders.USDⓈ-M perpetual contracts leverage updatesBinance Futures will also update leverage and maintenance margin tiers for several USD-M perpetual contracts at 06:30 UTC, with updates expected to complete within approximately one hour.Contracts affected include:币安人生USDTSPACEUSDTIPUSDTCOOKIEUSDTRLCUSDTAPI3USDTYBUSDTAcross multiple contracts, Binance has:Reduced maximum leverage for smaller position bandsLowered notional caps at higher leverage levelsIncreased maintenance margin requirements for mid-to-large positionsThese changes are designed to curb excessive leverage and improve platform stability during periods of volatility.

data.title: Base Won’t ‘Pump’ Tokens: Jesse Pollak Slams Market Manipulation as ‘Illegal’
data.description:
Base co-founder Jesse Pollak clarifies that the network will support token visibility and adoption across the ecosystem while making clear it will not intervene in token prices or influence market outcomes, ensuring fair conditions for all projects.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/base-jesse-pollak-market-manipulation-statement/

data.title: ClawdBot founder: We won't issue a token, don't get involved.
data.description: ClawdBot founder Peter Steinberger stated on the X platform that he will not issue any tokens, and any project listing Peter Steinberger as the token owner is a scam. Peter Steinberger demanded that cryptocurrency practitioners stop harassing him and stated that he will not accept any fees.

data.title: BitMine Immersion Technologies Faces Challenges Amid Ethereum Price Decline
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies is experiencing substantial unrealized losses due to the decline in Ethereum prices, impacting BMNR stock. According to NS3.AI, the company holds approximately 4.2 million ETH, and the recent price drop has exerted pressure on its stock value. Technical analysis indicates a bearish head-and-shoulders pattern, with a crucial support level identified at $25.94. If this support is breached, a potential 30% downside is anticipated. The strong correlation between BMNR stock and Ethereum heightens the risk of further declines, particularly with bearish momentum indicators and the impending EMA death cross.

data.title: Bitget launches its 12th zero-fee stock token trading contest with a total prize pool of 30,000 BGB.
data.description: Bitget launches its 12th zero-fee stock token trading competition. During the event, rankings will be based on cumulative trading volume in tokens such as AMDon, SLVon, and NFLXon. The top 1-428 users will each receive an airdrop of 50 to 800 BGB tokens. Detailed rules have been published on the official Bitget platform. Users can register by clicking the "Join Now" button to participate. The event runs from 19:00 on January 27th to 18:59 on January 30th (UTC+8).

data.title: Portugal orders Polymarket blocked after surge in election betting
data.description:
Portugal orders Polymarket blocked after €4M election bets, citing illegal political betting and rising regulatory scrutiny across Europe and the US.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/portugal-orders-polymarket-blocked-after-surge-in-election-betting/

data.title: UK FCA Advances Cryptoasset Regulatory Framework
data.description: The UK Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) is advancing its regulatory framework for cryptoassets. According to NS3.AI, following consultations that conclude in December 2025, new legislation has been introduced to Parliament to support this regime. The framework is scheduled to begin on 25 October 2027. The FCA plans to establish a dedicated authorisation gateway for crypto businesses starting in September 2026.

data.title: Tom Lee Highlights Metals as Emerging Asset Class
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) that Tom Lee from Fundstrat discussed the evolving perception of metal assets during a recent CNBC live broadcast. Lee emphasized that metals are being re-evaluated by the market and are increasingly recognized as a tangible asset class. Historically, gold was primarily favored by a niche group of investors, but over the past three years, its status has shifted significantly.

data.title: Binance: Users with at least 233 Alpha Points can claim an airdrop of 14,600 XPIN tokens on a first-come, first-served basis.
data.description: Binance Alpha's second round of the XPIN Network (XPIN) airdrop rewards is now open. Users with at least 233 Binance Alpha Points can claim 14,600 XPIN tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. If the rewards are not all distributed, the points threshold will automatically decrease by 5 points every 5 minutes. Please note that claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim on the Alpha event page within 24 hours, otherwise it will be considered as a forfeiture of the claim.

data.title: Backpack CEO: The Solana ecosystem has focused more on the financial infrastructure sector over the past year.
data.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, Backpack CEO Armani Ferrante stated that the Solana ecosystem has focused more on a pragmatic area over the past year: financial infrastructure. Ferrante indicated he will be speaking at CoinDesk's Consensus conference in Hong Kong next month. "The network is increasingly being built around high-throughput on-chain transactions, market structures, and settlements—what people call the internet capital markets," Ferrante said. He added that while cryptocurrency prices remain sluggish and native cryptocurrency investors remain cautious, institutional investor interest in cryptocurrencies is high. The long-term prospects for Solana, and indeed the entire blockchain, depend on its role as a neutral settlement layer. In the future, assets such as stocks and derivatives will flow seamlessly between platforms in the form of standardized tokens, rather than being stored in isolated databases. As global finance moves more onto-chain, Solana will ultimately reap the rewards. (CoinDesk)

data.title: UK FCA cryptoasset rules advance with 2027 start date and new consultations
data.description:
UK FCA cryptoasset rules are moving forward after December 2025 consultations and new legislation laid before Parliament. The regime is scheduled to start on 25 October 2027, with a dedicated authorisation gateway expected from September 2026.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/uk-fca-cryptoasset-rules-advance-2027-start-date

data.title: Hang Seng's Gold ETF Set for Hong Kong Listing with Ethereum Tokenization
data.description:
Hang Seng to list tokenized gold ETF on Hong Kong Stock Exchange using Ethereum blockchain. Key players include HSBC as custodian and tokenization agent.
source: https://coincu.com/news/hang-seng-tokenized-gold-etf/

data.title: Binance has experienced a large outflow of funds over the past seven days, indicating that funds are simultaneously withdrawing from both "cash" and "assets".
data.description: CryptoOnchain posted on social media that Binance experienced a large outflow of funds over the past 7 days, with stablecoins and mainstream assets being transferred out of the platform on a massive scale. Specifically: USDT (ERC20) saw a net outflow of approximately $2.26 billion, USDC approximately $1.24 billion, BTC approximately $2.14 billion, and ETH approximately $1.35 billion. This indicates that funds are simultaneously withdrawing from both "cash" and "assets." While selling pressure may have decreased, buying power within the exchange is also weakening. Liquidity contraction often foreshadows potentially increased volatility, and price discovery may rely more on external fund flows than on Binance's platform.
